description: Agent Hill and Dr. Streiten discuss Coulson's supposed recovery in Tahiti. They note that Coulson believes he just vacationed, but there is a deeper, hidden truth about his return. Hill says Coulson can never know what really happened to him.

transcript.line: I would have been very happy not to clear you, Phil. I'd love for you to rest up some more.
I've had plenty of that. Thanks.
Three days in, I'd be begging for an assignment.
Tahiti. He really doesn't know, does he?
I-is there any way I can thank him? Are you sure nobody saw him?
